name: Hummus Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, combine the garlic cloves, sesame seeds, and 2 tablespoons olive oil.
2. Process until smooth.
3. Add the chick-peas, lemon juice, parsley, and salt.
4. Process again.
5. Slowly add the remaining 4 tablespoons olive oil and dark sesame oil.
6. The marinade will make about 2 cups.
